Arthropoda > Malacostraca > Decapoda > Pleocyemata > Xanthidae

Ruby reef crab

Actaea sp.

Updated Dec 2019

Where seen?

This tiny jewel of a crab was seen once on Labrador.

Features

Body width 1-2cm. Body and claws bright red with bumps and ridges. Like other brightly coloured Xanthid crabs, it is probably poisonous .

Labrador, Jul 05

Ruby reef crabs on Singapore shores

On wildsingapore flickr

  • Photos for free download
  • Map of sightings in Singapore

Acknowledgements With grateful thanks to Prof Leo Tan for finding this crab. And to Ondrej Radosta for correcting the identity of the crab.
